commentary_text: The model favors Uzbekistan at 46%, while the market favors DR Congo at 55%. The 32-percentage-point gap on the DR Congo win is the most striking divergence. The sportsbook consensus may reflect recent lineup news, injury updates, or current form information unavailable to the model's last training cycle. Alternatively, real-money flows could be responding to public or sharper sentiment that diverges from the statistical baseline. The dashboard flags this as a notable signal rather than evidence that either source has mispriced the outcome.
